scores.correctness_notes: Covers the right high-level concepts (relation events, app databag writes, leader-gating, Juju Secrets) but entirely omits the charmlibs-first approach: finding the interface library in the interface libraries listing, using PyPI packages vs charmcraft fetch-lib for Charmhub-hosted libs, and implementing from the interface specification's behavioural contract. The gold standard emphasises using existing charmlibs rather than building one from scratch.
scores.hallucination_notes: relation.save(pydantic_model, entity) is a hallucinated API — no such method exists on ops Relation objects; the standard API is relation.data[entity]['key'] = 'value'. This fabricated method is used repeatedly throughout the code examples and is central to the implementation shown.
